creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
per private email, riak-cs is now at 3.0.7 and uses modern erlang versions.

erlang-riak is from 2013 and is neither supported upstream, nor actually compiling in ports against any common targets viz https://www.freshports.org/lang/erlang-riak

This port should be removed, and dependent ports either updated (riak-cs is now available at 3.0.7) or also removed.
